regions.text: Climate can be too hot or too cold. Now we can use automatic controls to regulate temperature in buildings.
A thermostat keeps the air at a set level. If we point it to 70°F, it keeps the room at that temperature.
(Illustrations: A radiator and a thermostat with a temperature scale).
climate: weather patterns. thermostat: temperature control instrument. pointer: something that points. FUTURE: will point. PRESENT: point(s). PAST: pointed.
